summary: Session 2 (final): shipped the persistent fault-only System Status strip above both the Getting Started form and the Work Explorer tree (typed SystemStatusPayload; provider-key, Python, Copilot-CLI, and workspace-initialization faults relocated out of the form; the dead form-warning builders, copy constants, and gs-warning CSS removed), and the docs/modules.yaml render guardrails: an invalid manifest pins a loud strip fault naming the parse failure while the explorer keeps rendering the per-root last-known-good snapshot (pure chooseRenderableModuleSnapshot, falsifier-tested; the file is never auto-written; absent/valid-empty stay healthy), with docs/modules.yaml added to the workspace watcher. Started by github-copilot/openai gpt-5.4 high, resumed and closed by claude-code/anthropic claude-fable-5 medium per the routed recommendation. Gates at close: pytest 2,922 passed/6 skipped, extension unit 1,406, Playwright 22/22 locally, tsc clean, guidance ceilings OK; 0.41.0 local VSIX rebuilt (no publish this set). Verification (gpt-5-6, anthropic excluded): R1 found one Major (strip rendered from pre-seed gsState on first paint) fixed in flight with a source-ordering pin and literal fault-copy pins; R2 VERIFIED, zero findings. Advisory path-aware critique (pull_critique: gpt-5.4 + gemini-2.5-pro): gemini VERIFIED; gpt-5.4 ISSUES_FOUND with two findings, both fixed before close - (1) change-log.md not yet authored (authored in this close) and (2) stale README inline-warning claims (both READMEs now describe the strip; comment echoes swept). Session 2 UAT walks 4-6 are authored and armed against the rebuilt local VSIX with the ad-hoc mechanical floor satisfied; the human walk is pending the operator (autonomous close).
